auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Ecologi API key sent as a Bearer token. Find your key on the official Impact API page: https://ecologi.com/impact-api.

actions.name: get_carbon_offset_totals
actions.description: Get the confirmed and pending tonnes of carbon emissions avoided by an Ecologi user.

username.description: The Ecologi username used by the public reporting API.

pending.description: The impact total that is still pending payment.

actions.name: get_carbon_removal_totals
actions.description: Get the confirmed and pending tonnes of carbon removed by an Ecologi user.

username.description: The Ecologi username used by the public reporting API.

pending.description: The impact total that is still pending payment.

actions.name: get_habitat_restoration_totals
actions.description: Get the confirmed and pending square metres of habitat restored by an Ecologi user.

username.description: The Ecologi username used by the public reporting API.

pending.description: The impact total that is still pending payment.

actions.name: get_total_impact
actions.description: Get a combined view of an Ecologi user's confirmed and pending impact totals.

username.description: The Ecologi username used by the public reporting API.

inputSchema.description: The Ecologi combined public reporting request.

trees.description: The confirmed number of trees funded.

carbonOffset.description: The confirmed tonnes of carbon emissions avoided.

carbonRemoval.description: The confirmed tonnes of carbon removed.

habitatRestoration.description: The confirmed square metres of habitat restored.

trees.description: The pending number of trees funded.

carbonOffset.description: The pending tonnes of carbon emissions avoided.

carbonRemoval.description: The pending tonnes of carbon removed.

habitatRestoration.description: The pending square metres of habitat restored.

outputSchema.description: The Ecologi combined public impact response.

actions.name: get_tree_totals
actions.description: Get the confirmed and pending number of trees funded by an Ecologi user.

username.description: The Ecologi username used by the public reporting API.

pending.description: The impact total that is still pending payment.

actions.name: purchase_carbon_avoidance
actions.description: Purchase Ecologi carbon avoidance by kilograms or tonnes.

number.description: The number of carbon avoidance units to purchase.

units.description: The unit used for the carbon avoidance purchase.

name.description: An optional funded-by name shown on the Ecologi profile. If the profile is public, obtain permission before sending personally identifiable information or use a non-identifying label.

test.description: Whether to simulate the purchase without charging or publishing impact.

recipientEmail.description: An optional third-party recipient email for an Ecologi impact notification. The account-gated feature returns 403 when disabled; test mode validates and echoes the address without sending email.

idempotencyKey.description: An optional Idempotency-Key header value used to retry a purchase safely.

inputSchema.description: The Ecologi carbon avoidance purchase request.

amount.description: The purchase amount charged or simulated by Ecologi.

currency.description: The ISO currency code returned by Ecologi.

name.description: The funded-by name returned by Ecologi.

recipientEmail.description: The recipient email echoed by Ecologi.

quantity.description: The quantity allocated to this project.

splitPercentage.description: The percentage of the purchase allocated to this project.

splitAmountTrees.description: The number of trees allocated to this project.

splitAmountTonnes.description: The tonnes of carbon allocated to this project.

items.description: One Ecologi project allocation returned for the purchase.

projectDetails.description: The Ecologi projects funded by this purchase.

units.description: The unit used for the purchase.

numberInTonnes.description: The purchased amount normalized to tonnes.

outputSchema.description: The Ecologi carbon avoidance purchase response.

actions.name: purchase_carbon_removal
actions.description: Purchase permanent Ecologi carbon removal measured in kilograms.

number.description: The kilograms of carbon removal to purchase.

name.description: An optional funded-by name shown on the Ecologi profile. If the profile is public, obtain permission before sending personally identifiable information or use a non-identifying label.

test.description: Whether to simulate the purchase without charging or publishing impact.

recipientEmail.description: An optional third-party recipient email for an Ecologi impact notification. The account-gated feature returns 403 when disabled; test mode validates and echoes the address without sending email.

idempotencyKey.description: An optional Idempotency-Key header value used to retry a purchase safely.

inputSchema.description: The Ecologi carbon removal purchase request.

amount.description: The purchase amount charged or simulated by Ecologi.

currency.description: The ISO currency code returned by Ecologi.

name.description: The funded-by name returned by Ecologi.

recipientEmail.description: The recipient email echoed by Ecologi.

quantity.description: The quantity allocated to this project.

splitPercentage.description: The percentage of the purchase allocated to this project.

splitAmountTrees.description: The number of trees allocated to this project.

splitAmountTonnes.description: The tonnes of carbon allocated to this project.

items.description: One Ecologi project allocation returned for the purchase.

projectDetails.description: The Ecologi projects funded by this purchase.

tileUrl.description: The Ecologi URL for the purchased impact tile.

outputSchema.description: The Ecologi impact tile purchase response.

actions.name: purchase_habitat_restoration
actions.description: Purchase Ecologi habitat restoration measured in square metres.

number.description: The square metres of habitat to restore, with one decimal place.

name.description: An optional funded-by name shown on the Ecologi profile. If the profile is public, obtain permission before sending personally identifiable information or use a non-identifying label.

test.description: Whether to simulate the purchase without charging or publishing impact.

recipientEmail.description: An optional third-party recipient email for an Ecologi impact notification. The account-gated feature returns 403 when disabled; test mode validates and echoes the address without sending email.

idempotencyKey.description: An optional Idempotency-Key header value used to retry a purchase safely.

inputSchema.description: The Ecologi habitat restoration purchase request.

amount.description: The purchase amount charged or simulated by Ecologi.

currency.description: The ISO currency code returned by Ecologi.

name.description: The funded-by name returned by Ecologi.

recipientEmail.description: The recipient email echoed by Ecologi.

quantity.description: The quantity allocated to this project.

splitPercentage.description: The percentage of the purchase allocated to this project.

splitAmountTrees.description: The number of trees allocated to this project.

splitAmountTonnes.description: The tonnes of carbon allocated to this project.

items.description: One Ecologi project allocation returned for the purchase.

projectDetails.description: The Ecologi projects funded by this purchase.

tileUrl.description: The Ecologi URL for the purchased impact tile.

outputSchema.description: The Ecologi impact tile purchase response.

actions.name: purchase_local_trees
actions.description: Purchase Ecologi tree planting in the UK, US, Australia, or Brazil.

number.description: The number of local trees to purchase.

country.description: The country where Ecologi should plant the trees.

name.description: An optional funded-by name shown on the Ecologi profile. If the profile is public, obtain permission before sending personally identifiable information or use a non-identifying label.

test.description: Whether to simulate the purchase without charging or publishing impact.

recipientEmail.description: An optional third-party recipient email for an Ecologi impact notification. The account-gated feature returns 403 when disabled; test mode validates and echoes the address without sending email.

idempotencyKey.description: An optional Idempotency-Key header value used to retry a purchase safely.

inputSchema.description: The Ecologi local tree purchase request.

amount.description: The purchase amount charged or simulated by Ecologi.

currency.description: The ISO currency code returned by Ecologi.

name.description: The funded-by name returned by Ecologi.

recipientEmail.description: The recipient email echoed by Ecologi.

quantity.description: The quantity allocated to this project.

splitPercentage.description: The percentage of the purchase allocated to this project.

splitAmountTrees.description: The number of trees allocated to this project.

splitAmountTonnes.description: The tonnes of carbon allocated to this project.

items.description: One Ecologi project allocation returned for the purchase.

projectDetails.description: The Ecologi projects funded by this purchase.

treeUrl.description: The Ecologi URL for the purchased tree impact.

actions.name: purchase_trees
actions.description: Purchase Ecologi tree planting with optional test mode, attribution, notification, and idempotency.

number.description: The number of trees to purchase, from 1 through 250000.

name.description: An optional funded-by name shown on the Ecologi profile. If the profile is public, obtain permission before sending personally identifiable information or use a non-identifying label.

test.description: Whether to simulate the purchase without charging or publishing impact.

recipientEmail.description: An optional third-party recipient email for an Ecologi impact notification. The account-gated feature returns 403 when disabled; test mode validates and echoes the address without sending email.

idempotencyKey.description: An optional Idempotency-Key header value used to retry a purchase safely.

currency.description: The ISO currency code returned by Ecologi.

name.description: The funded-by name returned by Ecologi.

recipientEmail.description: The recipient email echoed by Ecologi.

splitPercentage.description: The percentage of the purchase allocated to this project.

splitAmountTrees.description: The number of trees allocated to this project.

splitAmountTonnes.description: The tonnes of carbon allocated to this project.

items.description: One Ecologi project allocation returned for the purchase.

projectDetails.description: The Ecologi projects funded by this purchase.
